nasb.text: and in the wilderness where you saw how the Lord your God carried you, just as a man carries his son, in all the way which you have walked until you came to this place.’

esv.text: and in the wilderness, where you have seen how the Lord your God carried you, as a man carries his son, all the way that you went until you came to this place.’

cnv.text: 並且在曠野裡，你們也看見了耶和華你們的　神，怎樣在你們所行的一切路上，背負你們，好像人背負自己的兒子一樣，直到你們來到了這地方。’

ccb.text: 你们在旷野曾目睹你们的上帝耶和华像父亲抱儿子一样，一路把你们抱到这地方。’
